title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DHL India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DHL India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DHL India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About DHL India:
DHL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DHL India!
